There are multiple issues. 
Please review ALL the dump.txt and give me FULL files for ALL the files that need to change
not just the yaml files but any source code as well 


in pr validation github action 
Run yarn ng test --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless
yarn run v1.22.22
$ ng test --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless
[baseline-browser-mapping] The data in this module is over two months old.  To ensure accurate Baseline data, please update: `npm i baseline-browser-mapping@latest -D`
The following packages are required but were not found:
  - The "browsers" option requires either "@vitest/browser-playwright", "@vitest/browser-webdriverio", or "@vitest/browser-preview" to be installed.
Please install the missing packages and rerun the test command.
error Command failed with exit code 1.
info Visit https://yarnpkg.com/en/docs/cli/run for documentation about this command.
Error: Process completed with exit code 1.

in build (24.x) 
Run if yarn ng lint --help >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  if yarn ng lint --help >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "Running linter..."
    yarn ng lint
  else
    echo "Linting not configured. Skipping..."
    echo "To add linting, run: ng add @angular-eslint/schematics"
  fi
  shell: /usr/bin/bash -e {0}
Running linter...
yarn run v1.22.22
$ ng lint
Cannot find "lint" target for the specified project.
You can add a package that implements these capabilities.

For example:
  ESLint: ng add angular-eslint

error Command failed with exit code 1.
info Visit https://yarnpkg.com/en/docs/cli/run for documentation about this command.
Error: Process completed with exit code 1.

  else

  shell: /usr/bin/bash -e {0}

kushal@fedora:~/src/angular/angulareighteen.github.io$ yarn audit
yarn audit v1.22.22

│ high          │ Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) in cross-spawn  │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Package       │ cross-spawn                                                  │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ More info     │ https://www.npmjs.com/advisories/1113552                     │
└───────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌───────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ high          │ glob CLI: Command injection via -c/--cmd executes matches    │
│               │ with shell:true                                              │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Package       │ glob                                                         │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Patched in    │ >=10.5.0                                                     │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Dependency of │ @angular/cli                                                 │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Path          │ @angular/cli > pacote > npm-registry-fetch > minipass-fetch  │
│               │ > minizlib > rimraf > glob                                   │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ More info     │ https://www.npmjs.com/advisories/1109842                     │
└───────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌───────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ high          │ minimatch has a ReDoS via repeated wildcards with            │
│               │ non-matching literal in pattern                              │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Package       │ minimatch                                                    │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Patched in    │ >=9.0.6                                                      │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Dependency of │ @angular/cli                                                 │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Path          │ @angular/cli > pacote > npm-registry-fetch > minipass-fetch  │
│               │ > minizlib > rimraf > glob > minimatch                       │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ More info     │ https://www.npmjs.com/advisories/1113465                     │
└───────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌───────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ high          │ minimatch has ReDoS: matchOne() combinatorial backtracking   │
│               │ via multiple non-adjacent GLOBSTAR segments                  │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Package       │ minimatch                                                    │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Patched in    │ >=9.0.7                                                      │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Dependency of │ @angular/cli                                                 │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Path          │ @angular/cli > pacote > npm-registry-fetch > minipass-fetch  │
│               │ > minizlib > rimraf > glob > minimatch                       │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ More info     │ https://www.npmjs.com/advisories/1113544                     │
└───────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌───────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ high          │ minimatch ReDoS: nested *() extglobs generate                │
│               │ catastrophically backtracking regular expressions            │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Package       │ minimatch                                                    │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

│ Path          │ @angular/cli > pacote > sigstore > @sigstore/tuf > tuf-js >  │
│               │ make-fetch-happen > minipass-fetch > minizlib > rimraf >     │
│               │ glob > minimatch                                             │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ More info     │ https://www.npmjs.com/advisories/1113544                     │
└───────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌───────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ high          │ minimatch has ReDoS: matchOne() combinatorial backtracking   │
│               │ via multiple non-adjacent GLOBSTAR segments                  │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Package       │ minimatch                                                    │
├───────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Patched in    │ >=9.0.7                                                      │

│ Dependency of │ @angular/cli                                                 │
